message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator All Units: Complete Guide & Tier List 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Tactical Simulator all units with our 2026 guide. Learn about evolution, secret units, trait rerolling, and fast world progression strategies.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Anime+Tactical+Simulator+Units",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime Tactical Simulator all units** range from Common to Secret rarity; prioritize Legendary and Mythic units for early-game efficiency.
- **Evolution System**: Sell Mythic and Secret units to obtain Souls, which are required alongside duplicate units to evolve your core squad.
- **World Progression**: Focus on unlocking new islands using Yen rather than grinding high-HP bosses in early worlds.
- **Best Traits**: Aim for combinations like **Extremist** and **Dead Eye** to maximize damage output for late-game content.
- **Gamepass Priority**: Invest in **Card Access** and **+2 Units Equip** first to double your damage and summon efficiency.
</Callout>

Building the ultimate squad in Anime Tactical Simulator requires a deep understanding of how different rarities, traits, and evolution paths interact. Whether you are aiming to collect iconic characters like Goku and Naruto or hunting for elusive Secret units like Igris, managing your roster effectively is the key to dominance. In this comprehensive guide, we will explore **Anime Tactical Simulator all units**, providing you with the strategies needed to progress through worlds, optimize your team's traits, and master the evolution system. By focusing on high-rarity units and utilizing the right resources, you can transform a basic team into a powerhouse capable of clearing nightmare raids and climbing the highest floors of the Tower. This **Anime Tactical Simulator all units** breakdown covers everything from beginner tips to advanced AFK grinding methods updated for March 2026.

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Anime Tactical Simulator All Units: Rarity & Management">

Understanding the rarity hierarchy is the first step toward building a viable team. In the early game, you will mostly encounter Common, Rare, and Epic units. While these are useful for initial tutorial missions, they should quickly be phased out in favor of Legendary and Mythic tiers. Mythic units are surprisingly accessible in this game, and obtaining a full team of them is a realistic goal for any active player within the first few days of play.

**Video Highlights:**
- Fast progression path for new players to reach the latest maps.
- Priority gamepasses to purchase with Gems or Robux.
- Evolution mechanics explained through the Lady Knight NPC.
- How to handle unit inventory (Fuse vs. Sell).

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="dZlDpBZ8P7E" title="Anime Tactical Simulator Beginner Guide" />

Managing your inventory is crucial because of the Soul system. Instead of simply deleting unwanted units, you must decide whether to fuse them for experience or sell them for evolution materials.

| Rarity | Action Recommendation | Primary Use |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Common/Rare** | Fuse Immediately | Leveling up main units |
| **Epic** | Fuse or Sell | Early leveling or low-tier Souls |
| **Legendary** | Keep Early / Sell Late | Core damage / Legendary Souls |
| **Mythic** | **ALWAYS KEEP** | Evolution and End-game content |
| **Secret** | **ALWAYS KEEP** | Highest damage / Secret Souls |

<Callout type="tip" title="Inventory Management">
Never sell your Mythic units early on. Even if you have duplicates, you will need them later to evolve your primary units. Evolution requires both duplicate units and Souls obtained by selling units of the same rarity.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="World Progression & Unlock Strategy">

Progression in Anime Tactical Simulator is gated by Yen. Each new world introduces stronger enemies, better loot, and higher-tier pack summoners. However, a common mistake many players make is spending too much time on "boss grind" quests in early worlds. These quests often require 100+ kills on a boss that has millions of HP, which is incredibly inefficient when your damage is low.

| World Name | Unlock Cost | Key Features |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Planet Nex** | Free | Starter quests, Tutorial |
| **Pirate Sea** | 100,000 Yen | Stat Upgrades, Devil Fruits |
| **Demon Forest** | 1,000,000 Yen | Advanced Pack Openers, Trait Rerolls |
| **Abandoned Village** | 10,000,000 Yen | Awakening Dungeons, High-tier Raids |

To progress efficiently, follow these steps to reach the end-game maps where your damage output will skyrocket.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initial World Clear">
    Focus on basic kill quests that involve standard mobs. These provide the Yen needed to unlock the next world quickly.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Skip Heavy Boss Quests">
    If a quest asks for 100 boss kills, ignore it. Move to the next world, get stronger units, and return later to one-shot the boss.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Unlock Stat Upgrades">
    Visit NPCs like Darling or Hassan Miku to spend Movement Medals and other resources on permanent stat boosts.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Enter Raids">
    Once you have 3-4 Mythic units, start farming Raids for Stat Cubes and Medals to further enhance your squad.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="warning" title="Efficiency Alert">
Don't waste time on the "Imagine Pudding" or similar boss quests in World 1 or 2 during your first few hours. You can complete these in minutes once you have World 4 units.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Unit Evolution & The Soul System">

Evolution is the primary way to keep your **Anime Tactical Simulator all units** relevant as the difficulty scales. An evolved unit gains significant damage multipliers and improved abilities. To evolve a unit, you must visit the Lady Knight NPC and provide the necessary materials.

<Checklist
  id="evolution-requirements"
  title="Evolution Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Obtain a duplicate copy of the unit you want to evolve",
    "Sell units of the same rarity to acquire specific Souls",
    "Reach the level cap for the base unit (Level 10+)",
    "Collect enough Yen to cover the evolution fee",
    "Confirm the evolution at the Lady Knight NPC"
  ]}
/>

The Soul system is often misunderstood. To get Mythic Souls, you must sell Mythic units. This creates a loop where you summon units, keep the best ones, and sacrifice the rest to empower your leaders.

<Callout type="success" title="Evolution Power Spike">
Each star gained through evolution significantly boosts base damage. A 3-star Mythic unit can often outperform a base-level Secret unit in specific scenarios.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Advanced Optimization: Traits & AFK Grinding">

Once you have a solid team of Mythic or Secret units, the next step is optimizing their Traits. Traits provide massive percentage-based buffs to damage, speed, and ability power. For the current 2026 meta, certain combinations stand above the rest.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="S-Tier: Extremist">
    - **+100% Damage**
    - -25% Attack Speed
    - +50% Ability Damage
  </Card>
  <Card title="S-Tier: Dead Eye">
    - Massive Critical Chance
    - High Accuracy
    - Best paired with Extremist
  </Card>
  <Card title="A-Tier: Annihilator">
    - High raw damage buff
    - Consistent performance
    - Great for AFK farming
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

For units like Igris (the Crimson Knight), players often use AFK grinding methods to obtain them. Igris has a low drop rate (0.5%), so using tools like Tiny Task to automate the Awakening Dungeon is a popular strategy.

**AFK Grinding Highlights:**
- Set up Tiny Task for the Awakening Dungeon.
- Position your character to the left of the center for optimal AI targeting.
- Ensure your "Travel" menu is open to reset the dungeon automatically.
- Use units with **Dead Eye** and **Annihilator** for the fastest clear times.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="zkUcbi3uVLI" title="How to AFK Grind Igris" />

<Callout type="info" title="Trait Rerolling">
Use your Premium Medals sparingly. Save them for late-game Secret units. Early-game Legendary and Mythic units can clear most content with basic traits or even no traits at all.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Gamepass Priority & Economy Guide">

Anime Tactical Simulator features over 27 gamepasses, but not all are essential. Fortunately, many can be purchased with Gems, which are earned through codes, achievements, and the Tower mode. Prioritizing the right passes will drastically speed up your progression.

| Gamepass | Priority | Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Card Access** | **S-Tier** | Open summon cards anywhere in the world |
| **+2 Units Equip** | **S-Tier** | Increases active squad size (Massive DPS boost) |
| **+3 Cards Open** | **S-Tier** | Summon units 3x faster |
| **2x Gold/Yen** | **A-Tier** | Essential for unlocking worlds quickly |
| **VIP** | **B-Tier** | 15% more Gold and 5% more XP |

<Callout type="tip" title="Gem Farming">
The best way to get Gems for gamepasses is through the **Tower Mode**. Each floor provides a Gem reward, and reaching milestones like Floor 25 and 50 unlocks permanent extra unit slots for your team.
</Callout>

In addition to gamepasses, keep an eye on active codes. As of March 2026, codes like **ATSForever** and **RELEASED!** provide hundreds of gems and premium rerolls that are vital for early-game success.

| Code | Rewards | Requirement |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **ATSForever** | 500 Gems, 10 Premium Rerolls | Join Group |
| **RELEASED!** | 500 Gems, 10 Talent Rerolls | None |
| **1MVISITLETSGOO** | 250 Gems, 2 Dungeon Keys | None |
| **NoMoreBugsPls** | 250 Gems, 5 Talent Keycards | None |

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Anime Tactical Simulator FAQ">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get Secret units in Anime Tactical Simulator?",
    answer: "Secret units are obtained through low-probability summons (usually 0.1% or lower) or as rare drops from specific bosses and dungeons, such as the Awakening Dungeon for Igris."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the fastest way to level up units?",
    answer: "The fastest way is to fuse lower-rarity units (Common, Rare, Epic) into your main squad. Additionally, purchasing the 2x EXP gamepass or using XP potions can accelerate the process."
  },
  {
    question: "Why can't I evolve my Mythic unit?",
    answer: "Ensure you have a duplicate of the same unit and enough Souls of that rarity. You get Souls by selling other units of the same rarity to the Lady Knight NPC."
  },
  {
    question: "Which traits are best for Anime Tactical Simulator all units?",
    answer: "The current meta favors Extremist and Dead Eye for raw damage. Annihilator is also a top-tier choice for consistent DPS during raids and tower climbs."
  }
]} />

</Section>
